resultList.dtldesc: Introducing a splendid 3 BHK flat for sale in the esteemed Vajras Jasmine County, located in the highly sought-after area of Gachibowli, Hyderabad. This property stands out not only for its prime location but also for its vaastu compliance and East-facing orientation, ensuring a harmonious and well-lit living environment in one of the city’s most desirable neighborhoods.::::::Property Specifications ::::::This expansive 3 BHK semi-furnished flat, located on the top (14th) floor of a well-appointed building, offers a generous super built-up area of 2045 sq. ft. The flat is thoughtfully semi-furnished, and equipped with wardrobes, lights, and fans, providing immediate comfort and convenience. The layout includes three spacious bedrooms, each with an attached western-style bathroom complete with geysers, ensuring modern amenities and privacy. Two balconies enhance the living experience—one is attached to a bedroom, while the other adjoins the hall, both offering pleasant views of the road and surrounding amenities.::::::The open-plan living and dining area is designed for flexible use and ease of entertaining, while the modular kitchen, complete with a chimney and piped gas connection, features an attached utility area, making cooking and daily chores more efficient. The flooring throughout the flat is made of high-quality vitrified tiles, adding a touch of elegance and durability.::::::Facilities ::::::The property boasts excellent facilities, including two covered parking spaces, reliable water supply from both borewell and corporation sources, and 100% power backup to ensure uninterrupted service. Security is a priority with round-the-clock guard service and CCTV surveillance, enhancing safety and peace of mind. The building is serviced by two lifts for easy access.::::::Residents of Vajras Jasmine County enjoy an array of top-notch amenities such as a central AC system, banquet hall, cafeteria, conference room, and a service/goods lift. The property also features a comprehensive range of services including internet/Wi-Fi connectivity, laundry service, and piped gas. For leisure and recreation, there is a swimming pool, gymnasium, indoor games room, aerobics room, dance studio, meditation area, kids’ play area, and multipurpose courts. Additional facilities include a library, business centre, guest accommodation, and a large clubhouse with a private terrace/garden, event space, and amphitheatre.::::::Locality ::::::Situated in a vibrant locality near Continental Hospital, the flat is conveniently close to reputable schools, malls, supermarkets, banks, and ATMs. Public transport options are readily available, adding to the property's accessibility and overall appeal. This flat in Vajras Jasmine County offers a blend of luxurious living, comprehensive amenities, and a prime location, making it an excellent choice for discerning buyers.::

resultList.dtldesc: Luxury meets convenience in this elegantly designed 3 BHK flat at Vishnu Vistara, Hitech City. Thoughtfully crafted interiors, premium fittings, and ample natural light create a sophisticated living space. With top-tier amenities and seamless connectivity to key hubs, this home offers the perfect balance of comfort and modern urban living.Property SpecificationsPerched on the 14th floor of a premium high-rise, this 3 BHK semi-furnished apartment in Vishnu Vistara, Hitech City, offers a luxurious and well-designed living space spanning 1,890 sq. ft. The east-facing, Vaastu-compliant layout ensures positive energy flow, while large windows invite abundant natural light. A spacious living and dining area seamlessly connects to a balcony with stunning views of Cyber Towers, making it an ideal spot to unwind.Each of the three bedrooms comes with an attached western-style bathroom, complete with geysers for added comfort. The modular kitchen is equipped with a chimney, hob, and piped gas connection, complemented by an attached utility area for added convenience. Vitrified tile flooring enhances the elegance of the interiors, ensuring durability and easy maintenance.FacilitiesThis apartment comes with two covered parking spaces, 24-hour water supply from both borewell and corporation sources, and 100 power backup. Security is top-notch with guards, CCTV surveillance, and intercom facilities. Residents can enjoy modern amenities, including a clubhouse, gym, swimming pool, aerobics room, kids play area, and indoor games room. Additional conveniences include a cafeteria, multipurpose hall, conference room, and fire safety equipment. Two high-speed lifts ensure seamless access to all floors.LocalityConveniently located near the NIA office, this apartment offers excellent connectivity. Meridian School is just 1.2 km away, while Yashoda Hospital is within 400 meters. Malls and supermarkets are less than 5 km away, ensuring easy access to shopping and essentials. Public transport, including buses and autos, is readily available, with Hitech City railway station only 1 km away and the metro station at a distance of 2 km. Banks and ATMs are also close by for added convenience.
